testcase.name: Enhanced Test Chat - Comprehensive Test Suite › Text Chat Functionality › should send and display user messages

testcase.name: Enhanced Test Chat - Comprehensive Test Suite › Text Chat Functionality › should handle Enter key for sending messages
Enhanced Test Chat - Comprehensive Test Suite › Text Chat Functionality › should prevent sending empty messages
Enhanced Test Chat - Comprehensive Test Suite › Text Chat Functionality › should receive AI responses to user messages
Enhanced Test Chat - Comprehensive Test Suite › WebSocket Connection Management › should establish WebSocket connection to ElevenLabs service
Enhanced Test Chat - Comprehensive Test Suite › WebSocket Connection Management › should handle WebSocket connection errors gracefully
Enhanced Test Chat - Comprehensive Test Suite › Live Voice Conversation Flow › should request microphone permissions when Live Mode is activated
Enhanced Test Chat - Comprehensive Test Suite › Live Voice Conversation Flow › should handle microphone permission denial gracefully
Enhanced Test Chat - Comprehensive Test Suite › Performance Metrics Tracking › should update performance metrics during interactions
Enhanced Test Chat - Comprehensive Test Suite › Performance Metrics Tracking › should display metrics in correct format
Enhanced Test Chat - Comprehensive Test Suite › Error Handling and Edge Cases › should handle API errors gracefully
Enhanced Test Chat - Comprehensive Test Suite › Error Handling and Edge Cases › should maintain functionality after network interruptions
Enhanced Test Chat - Comprehensive Test Suite › Responsive Design and Accessibility › should work on mobile viewport
Enhanced Test Chat - Comprehensive Test Suite › Responsive Design and Accessibility › should work on tablet viewport
Enhanced Test Chat - Comprehensive Test Suite › Responsive Design and Accessibility › should have proper keyboard navigation
